channel.title: David's AI Daily Brief (audio)
channel.description: A three-minute spoken distillation of The AI Daily Brief podcast, with notes for UK general practice. Personal, non-commercial. All editorial content (c) The AI Daily Brief.
channel.itunes:author: Claude, for David Lloyd

item.title: 5 Ways Claude Tag Could Change How You Use AI (2026-06-24)
item.description: Spoken daily brief: the One Idea plus GP's Corner. Distilled from The AI Daily Brief podcast.
